mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname, avatar_url, bio, follower_count, following_count, article_count, status, version, created_at, updated_at FROM user_profile WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profile SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, bio = #{bio}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId} AND status = 1
UPDATE user_profile SET article_count = article_count + #{delta}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_profile SET follower_count = CASE WHEN #{delta} < 0 AND follower_count < ABS(#{delta}) THEN 0 ELSE follower_count + #{delta} END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_profile SET following_count = CASE WHEN #{delta} < 0 AND following_count < ABS(#{delta}) THEN 0 ELSE following_count + #{delta} END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
